column1: 言われるままに行動していては、自分の意見がなくなる。
column2: いわれるままにこうどうしていては、じぶんのいけんがなくなる。
column3: If you act as you are told without question, you will lose your own opinion.
column6: following another's direction passively without one's own judgement
column8: V-passive + ままに = being led without resistance; ままに = as things are/as directed
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:verb-passive-ままに complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 流されるままに生きていたら、夢を見失ってしまう。
column2: ながされるままにいきていたら、ゆめをみうしなってしまう。
column3: If you live carried along by the current, you will lose sight of your dreams.
column4: ままに (going with the flow passively)
column6: warns against passive acceptance of circumstances
column8: ままに after passive verbs of movement (流される・押される) = passively go along
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:verb-passive-ままに complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 誘われるままについて行ったが、知らない場所だった。
column2: さそわれるままについていったが、しらないばしょだった。
column3: I followed along as invited and ended up somewhere I didn't know.
column6: going along with an invitation without independent thought
column8: ままに = passively following; implies no active decision-making by the subject
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:verb-passive-ままに complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top5k complexity:standard

column1: 指示されるままに従ったが、後悔した。
column2: しじされるままにしたがったが、こうかいした。
column3: I complied as instructed but later regretted it.
column6: following instructions without exercising one's own judgement
column8: ままに often implies the subject could have chosen otherwise; used with regret
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:verb-passive-ままに complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 押しつけられるままに仕事を引き受けてしまった。
column2: おしつけられるままにしごとをひきうけてしまった。
column3: I accepted the work as it was thrust upon me.
column6: accepting an imposition without resistance or assertion
column7: took on the work without saying no
column8: ままに after imposing passive verbs (押しつける・強いる etc.) = reluctant passive acceptance
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:verb-passive-ままに complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top1k complexity:standard
